sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113182" key="xalkotu/pion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκοτῠ´π-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n113182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαλκοτυπεῖον.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
